scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && pnpm reset && pnpm seed
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter mobile typecheck
scripts.check:alpha: pnpm check:secret-leaks && pnpm check:nhost-safety && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter @yurbrain/client test && pnpm --filter @yurbrain/db test && pnpm --filter mobile test && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.check:production-safety: pnpm check:secret-leaks && pnpm check:nhost-safety && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:nhost-safety && pnpm build:nhost-safety
scripts.test:nhost-safety: pnpm --filter @yurbrain/client test && pnpm --filter mobile test && pnpm --filter @yurbrain/db test && pnpm --filter api exec tsx --test src/__tests__/nhost-admin-graphql.test.ts
